mapper.select: select status from friend_request where sender_id = #{senderId} and receiver_id = #{receiverId}

select fr.id as friendRequestId,u.id as senderId,u.phone,u.email,u.nickname,fr.create_time from friend_request as fr left join user as u on fr.sender_id = u.id where fr.receiver_id = #{userId} and fr.status = 0
mapper.delete: delete from friend_request where (sender_id,receiver_id) in ( select u1.user_id,u2.user_id from conversation_user as u1 left join conversation_user as u2 on u1.conversation_id = u2.conversation_id where u1.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and u1.user_id != u2.user_id )
